Avatar Selection

Pick the presenter for the 9 Enterprises Universe walkthrough + Rapid Mortgage pitch. All 15 options shown below with photos.

Top Picks — Lifestyle

These hold attention. Attractive, natural, engaging.

1. Gala
Striking dark hair, natural beauty. 18 looks — office, sofa, business casual, bedroom. Very attractive, holds attention.
9's #1 PICK
2. Georgia
Attractive brunette. Business blazer with blue top. Warm, inviting smile. 5 looks available. Professional but approachable.

3. Jocelyn
Casual, natural look. Black top, denim. 8 looks — sofa settings. Relaxed/approachable vibe. Good for less formal pitches.
LIFESTYLE — 8 LOOKS

Attractive blonde, natural look. 8 looks, 14 voice options. Youthful energy, modern feel.
LIFESTYLE — 8 LOOKS

Warm, inviting appearance. 8 looks available. Natural beauty with confident presence.
LIFESTYLE — 8 LOOKS

Youthful, approachable energy. 6 looks available. Fresh, modern presentation style.

Natural, girl-next-door vibe. 5 looks available. Relatable and easy to watch.
LIFESTYLE — 5 LOOKS

European styling, confident presence. 8 looks available. Distinctive and memorable.

Distinctive look that stands out. 4 looks available. Unique presence.

Professional Category

Polished, corporate-ready presenters. Multiple outfits.

Professional, polished. 57 outfit options. Currently used in the pitch video. Blue suit, tan jacket, white shirt, and more.

Tell 9 your number and we will render the video with that avatar. Swapping = same script, ~20 credits, ~10 min turnaround. We can render multiple picks and compare side by side.
